main.description: Delete a simplespace-managed space. The authority stops issuing credentials, deletes its own repo in the space, and notifies registered syncers and known repo hosts via com.atproto.space.notifySpaceDeleted. Requires auth with a covering manage=delete grant, implemented by PDS.

space.description: Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.
